label: Emporio Italia
question: Are Gorgonzola, Bresaola, SanPellegrino the same Pass C failure mode?

verdict.label: one_underlying_emporio_variance_family
verdict.summary: All three rows fail at Pass C on the same Emporio dense 8-column table crop. Shared core: intermittent failure to copy Preço Total (VALOR), replaced by qty×unit synthesis or wrong-column/adjacent-row reads. Sub-patterns differ: Gorgonzola/Bresaola are discounted weight rows; SanPellegrino adds pack-metadata qty confusion (15 from 'x 15ud'). Not discount-column confusion on these three.

evidence: Same invoice, same geometry crop, same Pass C stage for all three
0/5 cluster runs got all three rows correct; 4/5 had ≥2 rows wrong on same invoke
Shared primary failure: line_total_net not from VALOR
All classified extraction_bug Class A in emporio-final-audit
emporio-discount-column-audit: dense Desc.(%) layout affects whole table
Gorgonzola and Bresaola root-cause audits both confirmed GPT variance (B), not GT

evidence_against: Different sub-mechanisms (weight vs case/pack) but same pipeline stage and prompt gap
Bresaola 39.48 bleed from Ventricina is adjacent-row variant of same VALOR failure class
SanPellegrino 48.84≈Bresaola 49.48 shows cross-row value reuse on same invoke
Single Emporio prompt block with 3 examples addresses all three
B_three_independent_bugs.result: REJECTED as primary framing — treat as sub-patterns within one family

valor_confusion.note: Primary — total not copied from Preço Total column

qty_confusion.note: Gorgonzola 1/8~1,5kg; Bresaola weight; SanPellegrino x 15ud pack count

discount_confusion.note: Desc.(%) not misread as price on these three; discount_pct usually null but total failure independent

weight_row_interpretation.note: Fractional kg qty trade-off when total correct

singlePromptExampleImprovesAllThree.answer: partial — one shared Emporio block, three row-specific positive examples required
sharedRules: Copy line_total_net from Preço Total only — never qty×unit when VALOR visible
Desc.(%) plain decimals are discount_pct, not unit or total
rowSpecificExamples: Bresaola: weight kg 1,83 + Desc 20,00 → total 49,48 (not Ventricina 39,49)
SanPellegrino: case qty 2,00 + Desc 10,00 → total 38,56; x 15ud is NOT quantity

confidenceRationale: Strong cross-row correlation on unified 5-run probe; consistent Pass C stage; visible/GT agreement on totals. 14% reserved for SanPellegrino pack-metadata sub-pattern needing distinct example and high run variance between probe batches.

recommendedNextImplementation.description: Single prompt section after v27 TOTAL COLUMN ISOLATION with three Emporio positive examples (Gorgonzola, Bresaola, SanPellegrino) plus shared negative rules for qty×unit and adjacent-row totals
priorityOrder: SanPellegrino pack-metadata negative (highest avg error €19.69, 0% stability)

estimatedRecoveryEuro.note: Worst-case €28.26 is single-run audit tail; cluster probe shows SanPellegrino worse than audit (avg €19.69 vs €4.70). Full prompt hardening target ~€25–28 at 90%+ stability.
